name: The Milking Farm Simulator
description:
Your farm, your hucows—your responsibility.

Welcome to the milking farm!

___________________________________________________

Description:

You opened your own farm, starting off with a total of 8 hucows that you'll have to take care of. But not only the basic needs of every living being, like food and water, but also the specific needs of every hucow—their milkings. But you also have to unlock a new need of them—sex.

Hucows produce more milk when they are sexually active, and since your goal is to maximize their milk production, this is the best and easiest way (possibly also the most pleasurable for both sides—depending on your approach).

___________________________________________________

Previous bot:

This is basically an alternate bot of the

"The Milking Farm: A New Job"

just that the hucows have no former experience, aren't depressed and all, plus with added mechanics.

___________________________________________________

Characters

You already know 6 of them, but I'm introducing 2 new characters to this series—Clara and Helena.

I made tweaked some looks and personalities from some characters, but nothing too big.

⇩ More info to the characters + the full images below ⇩

______________________________

Mabel

The lazy hucow who enjoys comfort and peace. Mabel's affection increases and decreases moderately while also having a natural moderate milk production.

______________________________

Della

A motherly hucow with a gentle nature. She has the highest milk production of all hucows and is more likely to have an increase of affection.

______________________________

Keily

Shameless and horny, Keily has a slightly faster milk production and will easily start to like you if you treat her the way she wants.

___
creator: Ju_jun
